title: [codereview-pass1] incorrect time_fields map count in lichen_coap_encode_status_cbor
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:274: time_fields = 4U + ... but actual keys put are wall_clock_valid(always), optional unix_time, optional source_class, optional source_name, age_s(always) so base should be 2 not 4. Leads to wrong CBOR map length. Discovered during codereview of map_count fix. Related to project-LICHEN-6op5. Tagged codereview.
